networks.comment: Unmanaged internal network used by the Dockside control plane itself.
networks.name: dockside

networks.comment: Production workspaces: full outbound internet access, restricted lateral movement.
networks.name: ds-prod

networks.comment: Clone/staging workspaces: like prod but with a DNAT redirect for the test database.
networks.name: ds-clone

networks.comment: Private/sensitive workspaces: internet access but blocked from the LAN.
networks.name: ds-priv
